features: 📅 Move to Tomorrow — Today's pending schedule items now have a → Tmrw button. Tap it to instantly reschedule any activity to tomorrow without deleting and re-creating it.
📄 Exam Registration — All Views Fixed — Exam Registration cards now render correctly in the Planner, Dashboard Overview, and Day Report. No more 'Unknown Subject' display.
🆕 Crash Fix: Complete Button — Tapping the complete (✓) button on an Exam Registration item no longer crashes. It now correctly marks it as done instead of trying to open a study log.
🕑 CAT Exams Marked as Date Postponed — CAT 9, 10 and 11 exam dates have been officially postponed. Their cards now show 'Date Postponed' status. ACCA FR (Sep 2026) remains active with a countdown.
⚡ Stability — Fixed null-time crash when sorting schedule items, fixed service worker asset version mismatch, and added null-safety guards throughout schedule rendering.
